mapper.sql: execution_id, test_id, mode, status, start_time, end_time, total_steps, passed_steps, failed_steps, input, output, step_results, screenshots, loop_context, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at, deleted, created_by, updated_by, deleted_by
mapper.update:
UPDATE t_execution
test_id = #{testId}, mode = #{mode}, status = #{status}, start_time = #{startTime}, end_time = #{endTime}, total_steps = #{totalSteps}, passed_steps = #{passedSteps}, failed_steps = #{failedSteps}, input = #{input}, output = #{output}, step_results = #{stepResults}, screenshots = #{screenshots}, loop_context = #{loopContext}, updated_by = #{updatedBy},
WHERE execution_id = #{executionId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.delete: UPDATE t_execution SET deleted = 1, deleted_at = NOW(), deleted_by = #{deletedBy} WHERE execution_id = #{executionId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT FROM t_execution WHERE execution_id = #{executionId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM t_execution WHERE test_id = #{testId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY start_time DESC
SELECT FROM t_execution WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY start_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_execution WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT FROM t_execution WHERE status = #{status} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY start_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE t_execution SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE execution_id = #{executionId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT status, COUNT(*) as count FROM t_execution WHERE deleted = 0 GROUP BY status
SELECT FROM t_execution WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY start_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
